message.content:
@startuml
title UTIL's Class Diagram

package "Twitter" as twitter
    package "Util" as util

    interface IAccessModifiers
        value()

    interface IAttributes
        value()

    interface IConstructor
        value()

    interface IMethods
        value()

    interface ISingleton
        value()

    class MessageHandler
        messageHandler : MessageHandler
        fadeIn : FadeTransition
        fadeOut : FadeTransition
        getMessageHandler()
        initTransitions()
        displayMessage()

    class WindowSizer
        anchorSize()

    enduml

    link IAccessModifiers..IMessageHandler
    link IAttributes..IMessageHandler
    link IConstructor..IMessageHandler
    link IMethods..IMessageHandler
    link ISingleton..IMessageHandler

    link IAccessModifiers..IAttributes
    link IAccessModifiers..ICloneable
    link IAttributes..IAttributes
    link IConstructor..ICloneable
